name: Mueller Winery
seoDescription: Mueller Winery — a small, family-run Healdsburg winery crafting limited lots of Russian River Valley Pinot Noir and Chardonnay since 1991. Tasting room on North Street.

hero.heading: Named among California's top Pinot Noir producers
hero.subheading: A small, family-run Healdsburg winery crafting limited lots of Pinot Noir and Chardonnay from the cool-climate Russian River Valley since 1991.

about.heading: A Life in Balance
body: Mueller Winery was founded in Healdsburg in 1991 by winemaker Bob Mueller, with a clear vision: to make small lots of premium Chardonnay and Pinot Noir. A UC Davis graduate with a master's in Food Science and Enology, Bob learned his craft at wineries including Foppiano and Charles Krug before striking out on his own.

The first release under the Mueller label was a 1991 Russian River Valley Chardonnay — just 315 cases, limited but extremely well received. His Pinot Noir debut followed with the 1994 'Emily's Cuvée,' only 266 cases, which sold out immediately. Knowing the cool climate and terroir of the Russian River Valley were ideal for Pinot Noir and Chardonnay, Bob still spends much of his time walking the vineyards.
Today Mueller remains a small, family-run winery in the Russian River appellation, with a relaxed tasting room in downtown Healdsburg where you may well be poured by Bob himself.

services.title: Pinot Noir
services.description: Small-lot Russian River Valley Pinot Noir, including the acclaimed 'Emily's Cuvée' and 'Hogan's Run,' with deep black cherry and blackberry character.

services.title: Chardonnay
services.description: Russian River Valley Chardonnay such as the 'LB' — rich with pear and pineapple, full-bodied with a spicy oak finish.

services.title: Zinfandel & Syrah
services.description: Old-vine Zinfandel and Syrah round out the lineup of small-production wines from select Sonoma County vineyards.

services.title: Tasting Room
services.description: Sample the current releases at the Healdsburg tasting room on North Street, open Friday through Sunday.

items.a: You'll find us at 118 North St.

We proudly serve Healdsburg, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at +17074738086 — we're glad to help.

sections.quote: Really good wine, and friendly tasting room staff. If you are not fortunate enough to meet Bob, Toby has amazing knowledge — you just will not want to leave.
sections.author: Yelp reviewer
